message:
feat(engine): add lowering gap tests, atomic bundle writes with locking, and parser gap inventory CLI improvements

lowering_pipeline.rs:
- Add lower_member_assignment_currently_emits_nop_placeholder test
  documenting that member assignments (obj.field = val) currently lower
  to Nop placeholder ops
- Add lower_non_arithmetic_binary_currently_collapses_to_add_placeholder
  test documenting that comparison operators currently collapse to Add
- Fix lower_do_while_statement test to assert 3 labels (loop + continue-
  to-condition + end) instead of 2, and verify continue jumps target
  the condition-check label and back-edge jumps target the loop label

parser_gap_inventory.rs:
- Add atomic bundle write protocol: acquire exclusive file-system lock
  via .parser_gap_inventory.lock before writing, remove stale commit
  marker (run_manifest.json) first, write data files, then publish
  manifest last as commit marker — prevents partial bundles from being
  visible to concurrent readers
- Add BundleWriteLock RAII guard that removes lock file on drop
- Add Busy error variant for lock contention
- Use atomic temp-file-then-rename write pattern with unique temp file
  names via NEXT_TEMP_FILE_ID atomic counter + PID

franken_parser_gap_inventory.rs (CLI):
- Refactor parse_out_dir() into parse_args() returning CliAction enum
- Make --help exit successfully (exit 0) instead of returning an error

parser_gap_inventory_cli.rs:
- Add parser_gap_inventory_cli_help_exits_successfully test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
